Hospital Reason- Urinary Tract Infect This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was due to urinary tract infection. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2430_HOSP_WND_INFCTN M2430 Hospital Reason- Wound Infection/Deterioration This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was due to wound infection or deterioration. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2440_NH_HOSPICE M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason-
